remaining_tasks.name: v1.4 release audit — tag, branch, merge to main

human_actions_pending.action: Review and merge gsd/phase-09-prompt-infrastructure branch to main
human_actions_pending.context: All 6 phases committed. Next step is release audit.

decisions.decision: Phase 11: Binary CV vs Non-CV with LinearSVC + TF-IDF, threshold 0.7
Phase 12: Shadow mode for rules — all rules start disabled, auto-activate at precision >= 0.9
Phase 13: ExtractionPipeline orchestrator chains preprocess → classify → extract
decisions.rationale: Clean separation, backward compat via use_two_pass flag

decisions.decision: Phase 14: Tesseract via pytesseract (not PaddleOCR), coordinate-based layout analysis
decisions.rationale: Lightweight, no GPU needed, no sudo required for installation

next_action: Create v1.4 release — tag, merge to main, clean up branch
context_notes: v1.4 milestone complete. All 6 phases executed autonomously over a single session. 17 plans, 13 new files, 184 tests (0 regression). Tesseract installed locally in .tesseract/ (no sudo). Branch is gsd/phase-09-prompt-infrastructure (legacy naming). Next step is release audit.
